response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong engineering fundamentals and experience building complex systems, but his core technical background misaligns with the role's requirements. Java experience dates to 2014-2015, while the last 5+ years focus on TypeScript/Node.js. Critically absent: Spring ecosystem expertise, Kotlin experience, and any demonstrated IDE internals or language tooling work. At senior level, current deep expertise in the required stack is essential.
strengths: Extensive experience building high-performance, complex systems (millions of HTTP/sec at Dunnhumby, distributed GIS platform)
Strong tooling and testing mindset—created testing frameworks (Fluent-Asserts, Trial) and developer tools demonstrating systems thinking
Proven end-to-end ownership across architecture, full-stack development, and infrastructure (DevOps, CI/CD)
concerns: Java expertise is 11+ years stale—last Java role at National Instruments ended December 2014
Zero demonstrated experience with Spring, Kotlin, Quarkus, Hibernate, or other enterprise Java frameworks
Recent 5-year career trajectory (2020–present) focused entirely on TypeScript, Node.js, and React, with no JVM or IDE tooling work

key_factors.factor: No Spring or enterprise framework background
